title: tuberaria perennis var. lanata
intro: Tuberaria perennis var. lanata, also known as woolly tuberaria, is a perennial plant species found in the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and woolly leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Tuberaria perennis var. lanata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, and can be applied topically to skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health.
